events.title: The Simpsons Album
events.blurb: Final stretch of the Springfield sticker hunt — 21 sets, 189 stickers including 29 gold stickers. Completion pressure is at its peak; gold stickers are the real chokepoint and anyone sitting on a spare gold is a hot commodity right now.

events.title: Springfield Partners Event
events.blurb: The Simpsons-themed Partner Event is live through July 5 — you need a sticker partner to fill each other's invite bars. Slots fill up in the first few hours; if you don't have one lined up yet, now is the time.

events.title: Sticker Boom
events.blurb: +50% stickers per pack for a limited window July 4–5 — if you have dupes queued up to trade, this is the window to move them and knock out sets while supply spikes.

events.title: Summer Splash
events.blurb: Summer quest chain runs all season — card dupes stack up fast during the grind. Get your H:/W: list posted before the next Cards Boom so you're first in line.

talkingPoints: Watch for the next Cards Boom in Coin Master — it drops ~50% extra cards, which means a flood of duplicates. The traders who post their H:/W: *before* it hits clear the most.
Gold Card Trade events multiply rare/super-rare trade value 3–5×. If you've got golds you're sitting on, that's the window to move them and finish a set.
Pro tip: scan your whole album once and SwapDeck shows you every player who's missing a card you have spare. Beats scrolling H:/W: lists by hand.
Stuck one card from finishing a set? Post it — someone here almost certainly has it as a dupe collecting dust.
Golden cards are the hardest to move solo. The Trade Chain + group league here exist to match you with the right holder faster.

Trading safely matters: even Monopoly GO's own safe-exchange screen is being gamed (scammers switch stickers at the last second). App-mediated trades with a trade log are the only way to protect yourself.
Don't sleep on the Simpsons album's final stretch — 29 gold stickers are the real bottleneck and they only move at peak completion pressure. If you have a spare gold, list it now.
Springfield Partners Event is live through July 5 — you need a sticker partner ready to go or you miss the window. SwapDeck's matching is the fastest way to find one.
Sticker Boom hits July 4–5 — +50% stickers per pack. Stack dupes before the event and you'll have more to trade right when everyone else is also looking.
Scopely's MONOPOLY GO!Chat app (6.5M groups, 25M messages!) is where sticker trades are being organized. SwapDeck finds your match — the trade itself gets coordinated wherever you chat.

Scam reports are spiking right now — Facebook has dedicated 'Monopoly GO Scammers List' groups and Reddit threads are full of warnings about last-second sticker switches. If you've been burned before, a trade log is your best protection.
